title: Super Economy (Formerly CityCraft)
description: This Minecraft mod implements deeds and money system that enables players to own property, trade, buy and sell land, start businesses, and accumulate wealth. It's a must-have for Minecraft fans who want to explore the game's economic possibilities
body:
This Minecraft mod implements deeds and money system that enables players to own property, trade, buy and sell land, start businesses, and accumulate wealth. It's a must-have for Minecraft fans who want to explore the game's economic possibilities
